title: rating.updated v1
description: Emitted by the rating service (V-T17) whenever a merchant's rating aggregate changes. Keyed by aggregate:merchant_id — at 100M scale (D11) merchant fan-out topics use SALTED keys `merchant_id#0..15`, so a celebrity/chain merchant's rating stream spreads across 16 partitions with PER-SALT ordering only; consumers (search) MUST be last-write-wins by `version`. Consumers: search — updates the store's rating in the discovery index, DEBOUNCED to <=1 index write / merchant / 5 min (D17). D30: additive-only within this topic. See contracts/events/README-per-salt-ordering.md for the salted-partition ordering contract.

id.description: mer_ token — the partition key (merchant_id); salted to merchant_id#0..15 for fan-out (D11).

rating_count.description: number of ratings in the aggregate.

version.description: monotonic aggregate version; consumers apply last-write-wins per salt.
